message:
test(session-index): add proptest strategies and property-based tests
for session metadata persistence and query correctness

- Add ArbitraryMetaRow struct with proptest strategies for generating
  random session metadata (id, cwd, timestamp, message_count,
  last_modified_ms, size_bytes, optional name) using constrained
  string regex generators
- Add helper strategies: ident_strategy (alphanumeric IDs),
  cwd_strategy (mixed concrete + random paths), timestamp_strategy
  (ISO-ish date strings), optional_name_strategy
- Add property-based tests exercising bulk insert and query paths
  with fuzzed metadata rows to catch edge cases in SQLite schema
  handling and JSONL round-tripping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
